title: Reading the Herd
description: Study a wild herbivore herd near camp without provoking it, then report findings back to camp.

stages.objective_text: Spot the herd from a safe ridge distance.
Move downwind through cover and study the herd up close.
Return toward camp to report herd migration findings.

narrative_notes: No spiritual/mystical framing. Tracker Elder is a practical camp scout, not a shaman. Emotional arc: curiosity -> tension -> quiet competence.
implementation_note: Implemented via engine-native TriggerBox actors + Actor Tags (no custom C++), since headless editor does not recompile C++ per hugo_no_cpp_h_v2 rule.
